methods.description: Process used to identify distinct layers (paleosols, loess, sand) within the aeolian sections based on visual characteristics and magnetic properties.

steps.description: The stratigraphic unit was identified through an examination of color, texture, and structure of the sediment.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify stratigraphic units based on visual examination of sediment color, texture, and structure in the field.
inputs: aeolian sediment sections in the field
outputs: preliminary identification of stratigraphic units (e.g., paleosol, loess, sand layers)

steps.description: However, the buried soils in these sections cannot be identified very well visually in the field but can be confirmed through the magnetic measurements. (This applies specifically to Yaozhou sections).
steps.searchable_summary: Confirm buried soil identification using magnetic measurements (specifically for Yaozhou sections).
inputs: sediment samples or locations for magnetic measurement (Yaozhou)

methods.description: Process used to correlate stratigraphic layers between different aeolian sections in the same area based on visual tracing of horizons.

steps.description: The correlation between two sections was done in the field; three soil horizons could be traced visually between both sections on the slope of the excavated road wall.
steps.searchable_summary: Visually trace stratigraphic horizons between adjacent sections in the field to establish correlation.
inputs: multiple adjacent aeolian sections in the field
identified stratigraphic units in each section
outputs: correlation of stratigraphic units between sections

methods.method_name: Age Assignment based on OSL Dating
methods.description: Process used to assign ages to stratigraphic units within the studied sections by referencing previously published Optically Stimulated Luminescence (OSL) dating results from the same study areas.

steps.description: Ages of each soil section are assigned based on the OSL dating of Zhao et al. (2007) for Yaozhou area and Ma et al. (2011) for Jinjie area.
steps.searchable_summary: Obtain OSL dating results from published literature for the study areas (Yaozhou and Jinjie).
outputs: OSL dating results (ages and associated depths/units) for Yaozhou and Jinjie from literature

steps.description: Assign ages to specific stratigraphic units or boundaries within the studied sections based on the obtained OSL dating results.
steps.searchable_summary: Map published OSL ages to the identified stratigraphic units/depths in the studied sections.
inputs: identified stratigraphic units/depths in studied sections
outputs: assigned ages for stratigraphic units/depths in studied sections

steps.description: Our sampling was performed jointly with J. Ma and her co-authors (Ma et al., 2011) in order to warrant correct matching between depths and ages.
steps.searchable_summary: Coordinate sampling depths with authors of dating studies to ensure accurate age-depth matching for subsequent analyses.
inputs: OSL dating depths/locations from dating study authors
outputs: coordinated sampling depths aligned with existing age framework
